name: Nebius AI Studio
description: Registers Nebius AI Studio as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Nebius API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Nebius API key
settings.description: Nebius API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to NEBIUS_API_KEY.

providers.name: Nebius AI Studio
providers.description: Refreshes Nebius chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
